_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: Following Nf2 inactivation, there was a 2-fold decrease in apoptosis as measured by cleaved caspase-3 immunocytochemistry and Western blotting...Nf2 loss results in increased glial (3-fold)...but decreased neuronal (4.6-fold)...and oligodendrocyte (5-fold) differentiation
details: Nf2 loss results in 2-fold decrease in apoptosis and increased glial differentiation (3-fold) but decreased neuronal (4.6-fold) and oligodendrocyte (5-fold) differentiation
